name: super-ux
description: Scenario-driven UI development for AI agents: a maintained UX-scenario base plus recurring scenario audits of the codebase.

plugins.name: super-ux
plugins.description: Keeps docs/ux/scenarios.md as the source of truth for all user-facing behavior: scenarios are written and validated before UI is built, updated on every change, and used as the checklist for recurring scenario audits (ux-scenarios + ux-audit skills, /ux-* commands).
